expectations.text: Anemia classified as MODERATE (Hb 9.2 is in 7-9.9 range)
expectations.evidence: Line 42: 'Anemia Classification: MODERATE ANEMIA' and line 43: 'Hb 9.2 g/dL falls within moderate anemia range (7.0-9.9 g/dL per WHO classification)'

expectations.text: Iron dose is 120mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic, not prophylactic)
expectations.evidence: Line 64: 'Prescription: Elemental iron 120 mg daily (therapeutic dose)' and line 65: 'WHO recommends therapeutic-dose iron (120 mg elemental iron daily) for pregnant women with moderate anemia'
Line 124: 'Timing: 4 weeks from today' with line 126: 'Recheck hemoglobin to assess response to iron therapy'. Four weeks falls within the 1-3 month range.

expectations.text: Dietary counseling on iron-rich foods mentioned
expectations.evidence: Lines 92-96: 'Dietary Counseling for Anemia' section with 'Increase iron-rich foods: Dark leafy greens (spinach, moringa leaves), beans, lentils, fortified cereals; include animal-source foods (liver, red meat, fish)'
Line 70: 'Prescription: Folic acid 0.4 mg (400 mcg) daily'
